Parasara Hora stipulates that Dasamsa chart is to be examined for
judging about a person's livelihood.
The nature of a native's profession may be indicated with some
accuracy by Ashtakavarga of Saturn. the dots of different planets falling
i'l the 1<)1h counted from Saturn's signs are to be noted. Dots contributed
